```{r}
#| label: tab-infectious-agent-detection-rate-per-agent
#| tbl-cap: "Pathogens"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

data |>
  neoipcr::get_infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table() |>
  gt(rowname_col = "group") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.font.size = 13
  ) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "n", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(matches("group") ~ pct(50)) |>
  gt::tab_stub_indent(
    rows = gt::everything(),
    indent = gt::from_column(column = "lv")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      weight = "bold"
    ),
    locations = cells_stub(
      rows = tl %in% c(
        "none",
        "domain",
        "kingdom",
        "order",
        "genus",
        "coag_type")
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      style = "italic"
      ),
    locations = cells_stub(
      rows = tl == "species"
    )
  ) |>
  cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("lv","tl")))

#data$infectiousAgentFindings |> dplyr::inner_join(data$infectiousAgentFindings$pathogen_key |> unique() |> neoipcr::get_pathogen_taxonomy(), dplyr::join_by(pathogen_key == inputId)) |> dplyr::group_by(order) |> dplyr::summarise(n=n())

#data$infectiousAgentFindings |> dplyr::inner_join(data$infectiousAgentFindings$pathogen_key |> unique() |> neoipcr::get_pathogen_taxonomy(), dplyr::join_by(pathogen_key == inputId)) |> dplyr::group_by(genus, coagulase) |> dplyr::summarise(n=n())

#data$infectiousAgentFindings |> dplyr::inner_join(data$infectiousAgentFindings$pathogen_key |> unique() |> neoipcr::get_pathogen_taxonomy(), dplyr::join_by(pathogen_key == inputId)) |> dplyr::group_by(species) |> dplyr::summarise(n=n())
```
